controls.verifier_policy: explicit two-stage confirm-first verify/repair with deterministic temporal-candidate hints for unknown infrequent aggregation

hypothesis: Passing deterministic temporal event/window candidates into the Qwen verify-repair verifier unlocks infrequent quantified rates (>=3/4) without regressing original regression targets (>=10/10), compared with verify-repair v2.4 alone.
metric_caveats: Temporal candidates are deterministic diagnostic hints; gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 scoring is unchanged.
Verify-repair doubles model calls versus direct extraction; latency is not comparable to direct-only runs.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing on this slice only.
Normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, evidence support, temporal-candidate coverage, and verifier decisions are diagnostic.
Do not extrapolate slice metrics to full-validation performance.
This is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
